name: cvetochaya-lavka
description: Цветочная лавка - Telegram WebApp with fullstack backend

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd app && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:app && npm run build:backend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && echo 'Setup complete! Copy .env.example to .env in both app and backend folders'
